title: Operator Algebras & Non-Commutative Geometry

c_star.why: C*-algebra elements: exp(iA) for self-adjoint A = unitary = EML-3

commutative_case.why: Commutative C*-algebra = C(X): continuous functions = EML-2 (measurement)

noncommutative_case.why: Non-commutative: exp(iA)·exp(iB) ≠ exp(i(A+B)): oscillatory non-commutativity = EML-3

tensor_test.result: Commutativity breaking: EML-2 → EML-3 (adds oscillatory phase) ✓

K0_group.why: K₀(A) = Grothendieck group of projections: real-valued dimension = EML-2

K1_group.why: K₁(A) = unitaries U(A)/U₀(A): unitary group exp(iA) = EML-3

atiyah_singer.why: Index theorem: K₀(EML-2) ⊗ K₁(EML-3) = EML-∞; shadow={2,3}

dirac_D.why: D = Dirac operator: exp(itD) = unitary propagator = EML-3

spectral_action.why: f(D/Λ) involves both real (heat kernel = EML-2) and oscillatory (spectral oscillations = EML-3)

tensor_test.operation: A(EML-3) ⊗ D(EML-3) = max(3,3) = 3 for components; ∞ for full triple
tensor_test.result: Spectral triple: EML-3 components; EML-∞ full structure ✓

finite_geometry.why: Finite spectral triple M_F: algebraic matrix algebra = EML-0

product_geometry.operation: Finite(EML-0) ⊗ Continuous(EML-3) = max(0,3) = 3; Standard Model gauge group emerges
product_geometry.result: NCG Standard Model: EML-0 × EML-3 = max(0,3) = 3 ✓

higgs_from_ncg.why: Higgs = inner fluctuation of D: D_A = D + A + JAJ*: EML-3

von_neumann.object: Von Neumann algebras (factors I, II, III)

type_III.why: No finite trace; Tomita-Takesaki: σ_t(a)=Δ^{it}aΔ^{-it}: EML-3

type_I_tensor_III.result: Type I × Type III: cross-type = EML-∞ ✓

connes_classification.why: Connes modular theory classifies Type III: EML-∞ structure

semiring_verdicts.new_finding: Commutativity = EML-2; non-commutativity = EML-3: NC geometry IS the EML-3 stratum

key_theorem: NCG Semiring Theorem (S292): Non-commutativity = EML-3: commutative C*-algebras are EML-2; non-commutative C*-algebras are EML-3 (unitary exp(iA) adds oscillatory phase). K-theory: K₀=EML-2 (projections=dimension), K₁=EML-3 (unitaries=oscillatory) — Bott periodicity = two-level ring {2,3}. Spectral triple (A,H,D): EML-∞, shadow={2,3}. NCG Standard Model: Finite(EML-0) ⊗ Spacetime(EML-3) = EML-3 — Higgs mechanism emerges at EML-3 stratum. NEW: Non-commutativity IS the EML-3 structure: commuting = EML-2, non-commuting = EML-3. Von Neumann Type III = EML-3 (modular theory σ_t = exp(it·log·Δ) = EML-3).
rabbit_hole_log: Commutative C*: EML-2; non-commutative C*: EML-3 (unitaries)
K₀(EML-2) ↔ K₁(EML-3): Bott periodicity = two-level ring
NCG SM: finite(EML-0) × spacetime(EML-3) = 3; Higgs from EML-3
Von Neumann Type III: modular theory σ_t = EML-3
